final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing trifold brochure for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou tourism itinerary, using a real Hangzhou city map as the background, with landmark icons floating above a card-stock surface.

Style/medium: high-fidelity print design mockup, flat-lay product photography style, trifold pamphlet physically folded and floating above a light cardstock surface with soft drop shadow; map background references authentic Hangzhou street cartography with illustrated landmark icons in a Lonely Planet / National Geographic travel guide aesthetic
Composition: three-quarter aerial view of the open trifold brochure, all three panels visible simultaneously, slight perspective tilt, shot with a 50mm equivalent lens, generous white cardstock mat beneath
Subject: trifold tourism brochure for "杭州市4天3晚旅游攻略"; Panel 1 (cover) — illustrated West Lake 西湖 panorama with Leifeng Pagoda 雷峰塔 silhouette, bold Chinese/English title; Panel 2 (center) — real Hangzhou city map as base layer with color-coded route lines for all 4 days, floating pin icons for 断桥残雪, 灵隐寺, 飞来峰, 九溪十八涧, 龙井村, 云栖竹径, 拱宸桥, 西溪湿地; Panel 3 (back) — day-by-day itinerary text blocks with emoji markers (⏰✨⚠️), meal recommendations, transport tips, and souvenir picks
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white textured cardstock surface, subtle linen grain, soft neutral studio light; no busy background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead studio light with gentle warm fill from the left, casting a clean layered drop shadow under the brochure; calm, refined, travel-editorial mood
Color palette: West Lake celadon green as dominant brand color, warm ink-wash beige as paper base, accent red for landmark pins, soft gold for section headers — colors reference traditional Song-dynasty palette
Materials/textures: matte coated paper surface with slight sheen on the map panel, embossed title lettering on cover, visible paper fold crease lines, cardstock mat with linen texture
Text (verbatim): "杭州市4天3晚旅游攻略" on cover; day labels "第一天：西湖经典游" / "第二天：禅意杭州" / "第三天：九溪烟树徒步" / "第四天：文艺收官"; landmark names 断桥残雪, 白堤, 孤山, 曲院风荷, 苏堤春晓, 花港观鱼, 雷峰塔, 柳浪闻莺, 灵隐寺, 飞来峰, 法喜寺, 宋城, 九溪十八涧, 龙井村, 十里琅珰, 云栖竹径, 拱宸桥, 西溪湿地; price callouts 46元, 320元, 50元/杯, 180元, 38元/盒, 150-300元; transport notes 地铁1号线, 7W路, 水上巴士1号线
Constraints: all four day-route lines must be visually distinct colors on the map panel; landmark pin icons must be recognizable mini-illustrations (pagoda, temple gate, bamboo, bridge); trifold must appear physically printed and folded, not a flat digital mockup; brochure must look self-contained and print-ready at A4 trifold dimensions
Avoid: generic tourist clip-art, blurry map backgrounds, floating text without clear panel structure, oversaturated neon colors, watermarks, lorem ipsum placeholder text, purely digital flat UI appearance
